action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 29 eval still 0.0 despite successful training (loss decreasing). Analysis: predict.py likely mishandles ee_state orientation: VLABench observation returns quaternion-based ee_state (likely 7-D [pos,qw,qx,qy,qz] or 6-D euler), but our code assumes 6-D euler without conversion. Using quaternion values as euler angles corrupts orientation, causing continuous IK failures and zero success. Decision: fix predict.py to convert quaternion to euler (using scipy) before adding delta_euler, handle both 6-D and 7-D ee_state, add error logging, and submit eval with existing LoRA checkpoint. This is the last training iteration; only one eval remains.
